§7Guide Book #53§r
§lOvergrown Jungle Troot§r
§8MOB§r
 
•§lRarity§r: Common
•§lBehavior§r: Neutral
•§lMob type§r: Troot, Treant, Nature-elemental, Magical.
•§lSpawns in§r: Overgrown Jungle
•§lHealth§r: 15 §o(Wild)§r

25 §o(Tamed)§r
•§lWalk speed§r: 0.25
•§lBreathes in§r: Air, Water.
•§lTempted by§r: Beetroot, Beetroot Pie.
•§lHealed by§r: Beetroot, Beetroot Stew, Beetroot Pie.
•§lTamed by§r: Beetroot Pie
•§lPossible drops§r: Overgrown Jungle

Log, Overgrown Jungle Sapling, Stick, XP Orbs.
•§lAggressive toward§r §o(Tamed)§r: Owner's attackers, Owner's targets.
•§lMelee attack damage§r: 2-3
•Wild Troot can randomly sit.
•Tamed Troot can be sat down.
•They can slowly regenerate

their health when they sit or sleep.
•Wild Troot can pick up the food that tempts them and eat it.

§lDescription§r:
 
§‘The Overgrown Jungle Troot is a curious, treant native to the dense vegetation of the Overgrown Jungle. Neutral by nature, these magical beings can be tempted and tamed with beetroot pie, becoming loyal companions that defend

§‘their owners and regenerate health when resting.
Wild Troots often sit idly and may nibble on nearby food they find tempting. When defeated, they leave behind jungle-themed resources, but taming one reveals their true value as gentle guardians.
